title: Throwable Bricks
description: Now you can express your anger towards others.
body:
# ![ Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2382a5358af84ed264b30add80ec7262c9e133cb.png)

Throwable Bricks is a simple mod that allows you to hurl bricks at enemies or efficiently break into homes with the help of everyone's best friend, **gravity.** Now you can properly express you're anger when you get bad villager trades and surely crack the skulls of whoever dares to get in the way of your brick-throwing rampage!


## ![Brick Thrower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfb567a3ed53692987eb28287c1f68fe2013b840.gif)


### Features:

- Break any and all glass (Nobody Is Safe)
- Throw Regular Bricks
- Throw Nether Bricks
- Deal Colossal Damage
- Remorse Free

**Now Go Throw Some Bricks.**

## ![Smashing Glass With Bricks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b2a98ca5b72a04f206078a5f4b58a7da6b2f571.gif)
